discovery.run_summary: Risk-off tape with financials, materials, industrials and defense weak (XLF -1.9%, XLB -2.6%, ITA -2.2%, KRE -2.3%), offset by semis strength (SMH +2%, AVGO +4.8%, NVDA +3.6%) on Trump's renewed Iran military rhetoric lifting oil and VIX. Mid-cap movers are mostly following sector tape rather than company-specific catalysts — no 8-Ks in the discovery set.

notable_index_moves: XLB -2.62% and XLF -1.93% lead sector weakness; KRE regional banks -2.3%
SMH +1.99% and AVGO +4.83% carry QQQ green while broader market red
VIX +4% on renewed Iran military rhetoric; oil +4%
ITA -2.24% notable given defense typically bid on Iran escalation — suggests profit-taking after prior run

discoveries.name: Builders FirstSource, Inc.
discoveries.setup: Housing-linked cyclical extending multi-day decline on macro rate uncertainty
discoveries.thesis: BLDR is down sharply over five days with no 8-K and average volume today — the move looks like continuation of a rate-driven housing derating (Fed minutes showed split on cuts, XLRE -1.65%, XLB -2.6%). The magnitude over 5 days is large but proportional to a housing demand scare; today's leg is just tape-following. Nothing here suggests mispricing either direction.
discoveries.what_confirms: Housing data (starts, permits) confirms weakening demand; peers like LPX, WY, SITE showing similar 5-day drawdowns
discoveries.what_kills: A specific negative company catalyst (guide cut, 8-K) emerging would recharacterize this as UNDERDONE bearish; conversely a rate-cut surprise would make it OVERDONE
discoveries.catalyst: Sector-wide housing/rate weakness; Fed minutes showing hawkish split
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: Empty catalyst_signals plus average volume argues against company-specific news; 5-day loss aligns with XLB/XLRE sector tape
research_pointers: Check LPX, WY, SITE, HD 5-day returns to confirm sector-move framing
Look for any pre-announcement/guide from BLDR ahead of Q2 print
Cross-check lumber futures and mortgage rate move over past week

discoveries.name: Onto Innovation Inc.
discoveries.setup: Beaten-down semicap bouncing modestly against a strong semi tape after a large 5-day drawdown
discoveries.thesis: ONTO is down heavily over five days but only bouncing modestly today while SMH is up ~2% and AVGO up ~5%. If the semi rally has legs and the prior drawdown was ONTO-specific (guide cut / earnings) that's already known, the sympathy catch-up is under-reflected. No new 8-K, so today's bounce is likely early beta re-engagement — usually there's follow-through when a beaten-down semicap starts to move with the group.
discoveries.what_confirms: Continued SMH strength into next sessions with ONTO closing the relative-performance gap; positive read-throughs from KLAC/AMAT/LRCX on WFE spend
discoveries.what_kills: A confirmed company-specific overhang (customer concentration issue at a memory/logic customer, guide cut still in effect) would justify persistent underperformance; SMH rally reversing
discoveries.what_to_learn: Beaten-down single names in a rallying sector on a strong-tape day are worth watching — the first day they participate is often the smallest participation; the setup is asymmetric if the group holds
discoveries.catalyst: Semi sector strength (AVGO +4.8%, NVDA +3.6%, SMH +2%) pulling laggards
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: Empty catalyst_signals; move direction aligns with SMH tape but magnitude lags
research_pointers: Identify what caused the prior 5-day drawdown — earnings? customer-specific news? guide?
Check ONTO exposure to HBM/advanced packaging vs. legacy — HBM narrative is what's lifting AVGO/NVDA
Compare ONTO's today move to KLAC, AMAT, LRCX, ACLS to see if it's the laggard of the group

discoveries.name: Align Technology, Inc.
discoveries.setup: Discretionary-healthcare name with sharp single-day drop on below-average volume, no filing
discoveries.thesis: ALGN is down sharply on a day when XLV is -1.3% and XLY is -1.78% — some sector explanation but the magnitude exceeds sector move. Volume is BELOW average, however, which argues against a discovered catalyst; more like thin-tape reaction. No 8-K. Cannot articulate either direction at conf 3+ — bear case needs a whisper/note we don't have; bull case (fade the move) needs a reason it's overdone that isn't just 'no news.'
discoveries.what_confirms: An analyst downgrade or channel check publishing today would explain the move and make it RATIONAL; peer XRAY moving similarly would support sector framing
discoveries.what_kills: Discovery of a specific negative catalyst (guide-down, competitive threat news) would break the UNCLEAR framing toward RATIONAL bearish
discoveries.catalyst: Unknown — possibly sector rotation or analyst note not in feed
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: catalyst_signals is empty; below-average volume weakens the 'known catalyst' hypothesis
research_pointers: Search for analyst notes on ALGN or dental/aligner sector today
Check XRAY, HSIC for sympathy confirmation
Look at options flow — unusual put activity would suggest leak/positioning ahead of a catalyst

catalyst_chains.primary_event: Trump renews Iran military threat, oil +4%, VIX +4%

trump_signals.post_summary: Fed working paper claiming immigration drove 30% of home price increases
trump_signals.note: Low signal — a talking point post, not a policy action. Housing already weak today on rate concerns; this reinforces political narrative but no direct tradeable trigger.

discovery.no_signals_note: Discovery set has no 8-K filings and mostly average volume — suggests today's moves are dominated by sector tape (housing/materials weakness, semi strength) rather than company-specific mispricings. ITA weakness despite Iran escalation is the more interesting pattern but no mid-cap defense name appeared in the movers.

ai_announcements.headline: Grok 4.5 released, described as 'Opus-class' at lower cost
ai_announcements.summary: xAI released Grok 4.5, positioning it as a cheaper alternative to frontier models from Anthropic/OpenAI.

ai_announcements.headline: OpenAI releases new voice models for live conversations
ai_announcements.summary: New voice mode with simultaneous speak/listen enabling live translation.

ai_announcements.headline: Google Photos adds AI Video Remix
ai_announcements.summary: AI-driven cinematic relighting, background swap, and style transfer for videos.

ai_announcements.headline: Meta launches Muse Image generator; expands AI glasses recording safeguards
ai_announcements.summary: New image gen model amid data-use pushback; AI glasses updates.

ai_announcements.headline: SambaNova raises $1B at $11B valuation
ai_announcements.summary: AI chip maker raises mega round at 7x prior rumored acquisition price.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: SambaNova capital raise signals continued AI chip investment cycle, which supports semiconductor metrology/inspection demand. Onto Innovation benefits from any AI-driven fab capex, though this specific news is a weak direct catalyst. ONTO also bouncing from a -23% five-day drawdown, so this looks more like a technical rebound than news-driven.
research_pointers: Check if ONTO bounce coincides with broader semi-equipment tape (AMAT, KLAC, LRCX)
Recent -23% 5d suggests oversold bounce dominates over SambaNova news
Monitor AI capex commentary from hyperscalers into earnings

ai_analysis.no_signals_note: The other moving stocks (ALGN, BLDR, RPM, DCO) show no plausible link to today's AI announcements. ALGN is dental/medical devices, BLDR is building products (likely housing/rate related; -17% 5d suggests fundamental/sector news), RPM is specialty chemicals with earnings in ~2 weeks (pre-earnings de-risking), DCO is aerospace defense. None have direct AI substitution exposure from today's news. These moves are almost certainly non-AI driven.
